name: Anointed
description: At your birth, a sign was given—a prophecy spoken, a storm unleashed, or perhaps you simply arrived when the world needed you most. Destiny does not merely push you; it listens when you speak.

feats.name: Foresight
feats.description: Once per **respite**, you glimpse a strand of possible futures. Grant **Resolve** to yourself or an ally on their next **attack** or **skill check**.
